nodes.name: Monthly Billing Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires at 06:00 on the 1st of each month, once the prior billing period has closed.

parameters.pythonCode:
# Mirrors src/invoicing.py + src/reminders.py.
# In production, call the Python service or replicate the billing rules here.
import datetime
tax_rate = 0.08
terms_days = 30
offsets = [3, 7, 14]
out = []
for item in items:
    inv = item['json']
    subtotal = round(sum(li['qty'] * li['unit_price'] for li in inv.get('line_items', [])), 2)
    tax = round(subtotal * tax_rate, 2)
    total = round(subtotal + tax, 2)
    due = datetime.date.fromisoformat(inv['period_end']) + datetime.timedelta(days=terms_days)
    as_of = datetime.date.fromisoformat(inv['as_of'])
    paid = float(inv.get('amount_paid', 0))
    days_over = max((as_of - due).days, 0)
    fired = [o for o in offsets if paid < total and days_over >= o]
    status = 'paid' if paid >= total else ('partial' if paid > 0 else 'open')
    out.append({'json': {**inv, 'subtotal': subtotal, 'tax': tax, 'total': total, 'due_date': due.isoformat(), 'status': status, 'reminders_due': fired}})
return out

nodes.name: Upsert Invoice (Stripe)
nodes.notes: Idempotent upsert keyed by client+period invoice id - re-runs never double-bill.

parameters.subject: =Reminder: invoice {{ $json["id"] }} is {{ $json["reminders_due"][-1] }} days overdue
parameters.text: =Invoice {{ $json["id"] }} for {{ $json["total"] }} {{ $json["currency"] }} is past due. Please remit payment.

nodes.name: Send Invoice / Receipt
nodes.notes: On time or paid -> send the invoice or a paid receipt, no chasing needed.
